mapper.update: UPDATE repositories SET name = #{name}, git_protocol = #{gitProtocol}, git_host = #{gitHost}, git_owner = #{gitOwner}, git_repo = #{gitRepo}, default_branch = #{defaultBranch}, strategy_type = #{strategyType}, status = #{status}, last_sync_at = #{lastSyncAt}, metadata = #{metadata}::jsonb, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM repositories WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM repositories WHERE connection_id = #{connectionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM repositories WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM repositories WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND name = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repositories WHERE id = #{id}
